info.title: Network Linked Data Index API
info.description: The NLDI is a search service that takes a watershed outlet identifier as a starting point, a navigation mode to perform, and the type of data desired in response to the request. It can provide geospatial representations of the navigation or linked data sources found along the navigation. It also has the ability to return landscape characteristics for the catchment the watershed outlet is contained in or the total upstream basin.

get.description: returns a list of data sources
returns a list of features for a given data source
returns registered feature as WGS84 lat/lon GeoJSON if it exists
returns all characteristics of the given type for the specified feature
Returns all features found along the specified navigation as points in WGS84 lat/lon GeoJSON

parameters.name: distance
parameters.description: Distance in kilometers. Note that this is a very expensive query and should not be executed in parallel

get.description: returns the flowlines for the specified navigation in WGS84 lat/lon GeoJSON
